历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3365 → 3976 → 4335 → 4436 → 4516, showing a trend of moving backward year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1151 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4516, with an annual backward shift of about 80–180 positions in the past 3 years, the pace of backward shift has slowed slightly but continues; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 27 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 35 in 2025, showing an expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 36, an increase of 1 (+2.86%) compared to 2025, the slight expansion intensifies competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 approximately 29th (Top 30), ranking stable between 28–31 in recent years, high school level and strong comprehensive strength; in the 2026 reputation file, East China Normal University is not listed, no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 28th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high, application attention generally warm; no signs of a cutoff signal in historical admission anomaly records; Education A+, Statistics A+, Physical Education A+, Software Engineering A, Mathematics A, Psychology A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Geography A, Ecology A, World History A, etc., with 14 disciplines at A- or above, outstanding disciplinary strength, strong attraction for high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors have been continuously highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Software, Statistics, Electronics, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), related majors are heating up; Hunan Province Physics Category candidates increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 320,000 in 2025 to 347,000 in 2026, increasing year by year, with an increase of about 8.4% in 2026 compared to 2025, competition continues to intensify, showing a downward trend, but ranking competition remains fierce; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Hunan candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Hunan has been increasing in recent years, with no special local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+1 person), the increase of about 8.4% in Hunan Physics Category candidates, and the high-level attraction of the school, competition is expected to continue to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 4516, with a slight backward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4673, with a range of 4173–5173.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 514 → 589 → 539 → 635 → 1578. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable between 514 and 635. In 2025, due to the addition of the Radio and Television Directing major (min_rank=1578), the school's overall ranking significantly shifted to 1578; excluding this major, the minimum ranking for regular majors was about 737. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 14 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, showing a slight decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is 12, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 29th (Top 30) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years and a high school level. In the 2026 reputation file, East China Normal University is not listed, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 28th (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure. No signs of enrollment gaps in historical admission anomaly records, with a stable and positive reputation. Strong disciplines include Education A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Psychology A, Geography A, Ecology A, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, Marxist Theory A-, etc., with outstanding strength in humanities, history, philosophy, and education, highly matching the History Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of majors like Chinese Language and Literature and Journalism and Communication is polarized (Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, while Chinese Language and Literature is recommended). Teacher training/education majors were assessed as polarized and wait-and-see in 2024, with cooling popularity. The number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province was 166,000 in 2021 → 143,000 in 2025 → 187,000 in 2026, with a significant increase of about 31% in 2026 compared to 2025, intensifying competition and showing a downward trend. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city that strongly attracts Hunan liberal arts examinees. Its enrollment plan in Hunan for History Category has been stable at 12–14 in recent years, with no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the ranking anomaly in 2025 due to the Radio and Television Directing major (1578), the discontinuation of this major in 2026, a significant increase of about 31% in History Category examinees, and stable enrollment, the 2026 ranking is expected to move forward significantly compared to 2025 (due to intensified competition but improved major structure), but will not return to the level of around 600 in 2021–2024. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1478, with a range of 1256–1700.
